series_metadata.series_description: This is a review of administrative settlements paid by BWC. It is used as a method of checks and balances to ensure settlements are processed correctly. A percentage of settlements under $10,000 are audited by a team leader and the supervising attorney. A percentage of settlements over $10,000 are audited by the lead attorney''s designee.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three (3) year, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain three (3) year, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
